message:
feat(console): add command palette with 25 actions + dispatch wiring (br-1m6a.21)

Add ConsoleCommandPalette wrapper in console.rs with 25 registered
actions across 5 categories (Layout, Theme, Logs, Tools, Help).
Wire into lib.rs: Ctrl+P and ':' open palette, events route through
palette when visible, PaletteAction::Execute dispatches to layout
changes, theme switching, log controls, tool logging toggles, and
help display. Extract persist_console_settings() helper. Add
tool_calls_log_enabled and tools_log_enabled AtomicBool toggles.
9 unit tests for palette: action count, unique IDs, categories,
visibility, stable ordering, render smoke tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
